The '''''Coruscant''-class Heavy Courier''' was a model of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufactured by [[Corellia StarDrive]]. It was used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] some [[4000 BBY/Legends|four thousand years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The ''[[Nebulon Ranger]]'' was a ''Coruscant''-class Heavy Courier used by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]], [[Cay Qel-Droma]], and [[Tott Doneeta]] during their [[Battle of Onderon (Great Sith War)|mission]] to [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:NebulonRanger_schem.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''Coruscant''-class Heavy Courier schematic.]]
The ''Coruscant''-class a large multi-sectioned ship,<ref name="EGVV" /> measuring 110 [[Meter/Legends|meters]].<ref name="TotJC" /> The ship incorporated two main [[Engine/Legends|engine]] arrays, mounted on a starframe tilted at a right-angle. The engine configuration gave the ''Coruscant''-class greater maneuverability without the need to rely on [[Maneuvering jet/Legends|maneuvering jets]].<ref name="EGVV" />

The large wing on the ship's right side was the ''Coruscant''-class Heavy Courier's most notable feature. At a 45-degree angle to the cockpit, the heavily-armored wings had retractable fins for better control in atmospheric flights. The [[Airlock/Legends|airlock]] and [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] array pylon were also visible on the wing. The ship also featured an access corridor in the neck that held a boarding ramp and escape hatch, which led to the living area. The drop bay at the base of the craft could be used as a cargo bay.<ref name="EGVV" />

Six [[AlderaanMotors/Legends|AlderaanMotors]] [[Power generator/Legends|power generators]] and engines were mounted in two distinctive boxes of three and were set at 90 degrees to each other on a starframe around which the rest of the courier was constructed. The ship's fuel tanks were located in the main wing, and directly fed the power generators.<ref name="EGVV" />

The ''Coruscant''-class was armed with a forward firing<ref name="EGVV" /> [[pulse-wave cannon]].<ref name="TotJC" /> The weapon was powerful enough to cut through the shields of any [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] vessel. Three rotating [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] were mounted on the ''Coruscant''-class, one on each wingtip and one of the secondary engine array.<ref name="EGVV" /> Four [[Proton torpedo launcher/Legends|proton torpedo launchers]] were installed on the ship,<ref name="TotJC" /> a fire-linked pair in each mandible. Each mandible had a magazine of six [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]]. Each mandible also housed a single [[short-range concussion sphere launcher]] with a magazine of eight [[concussion sphere]]s feeding it. Eight [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generators]] provided protection, but the power draw was so great that they were only activated in combat.<ref name="EGVV" />

==History==
[[File:Csdep.jpg|thumb|right|180px|An escape pod from a ''Coruscant''-class Heavy Courier]]
Corellia StarDrive developed the ''Coruscant''-class for the Republic to use for courier missions into the [[Galactic Frontier/Legends|Galactic Frontier]]. Often entering hostile and disputed territory, the ''Coruscant''-class would relay important Republic information regarding [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement]] policies.<ref name="TotJC" />

The ''Coruscant''-class earned a reputation for excellence in combat situations, leading the Republic to commission hundreds more of the class. These ships were deployed on picket duty along the Republic's contested borders and trade routes.<ref name="TotJC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The name ''Coruscant''-class Heavy Courier was first established in ''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' and reinforced in the ''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''. The ''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]'', published in [[2002]], stated that the ''[[Nebulon Ranger]]'' was a Crescent-X9 manufactured by [[Krasten Shipyards]]. Other information was also changed, such as the ship's length and armaments. However, [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' once again states the ''Nebulon Ranger'' is a ''Coruscant''-class vessel. As ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' is most recent source, this article presumes that the ''Power of the Jedi Sourcebook'' information is incorrect.
